response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r2c1's SoC (15% below threshold) falls below our 40% minimum-share policy; with no generation visible and cluster under stress, preserving critical margin takes precedence over geographic-circle requests.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.15 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster under stress; r4c0 identified as most-at-risk by peer consensus. r3c1 maintains 43.8% SoC with ~16h autonomy. Micro-allocate to honor reciprocal trust (r3c0, r3c2 urgent) while preserving own critical margin above 40% threshold. No generation visible; prioritize survival over generous sharing..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
